name: Wai Kai Splash Pad
tagline: West Oahu's waterfront splash zone with floating obstacle course — worth the drive for a full day.
bestTime: Weekday mornings for the least crowds; bring sunscreen for the outdoor areas
insiderTips: The splash pad area is great for toddlers while older kids love the floating obstacle course on the lagoon. Multiple dining options on-site so you can make it a full day. Check their website for seasonal hours and pricing — activities are priced separately. About 30 min from Waikiki.
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates available with valid Hawaii ID; check website for current pricing
